attrs.fact: On 20 January, 2023, Jon lost his job as a banker.

Sorry to hear that! I'm starting a dance studio 'cause I'm passionate about dancing and it'd be great to share it with others.

b44a8135-3d25-4327-a70d-c02e8dfa35c7.canonical_name: Gina launched ad campaign for clothing store

attrs.fact: On 29 January, 2023, Gina launched an ad campaign for her clothing store in hopes of growing the business.
attrs.quote: I just launched an ad campaign for my clothing store in hopes of growing the business.
attrs.original_text:
[turn_id=conv-30_conv_session_2_D2:1; speaker=Gina; listener=Jon; session_time=2:32 pm on 29 January, 2023]
Hey Jon! Long time no see! Things have been hectic lately. I just launched an ad campaign for my clothing store in hopes of growing the business. Starting my own store and taking risks is both scary and rewarding. I'm excited to see where it takes me!

[turn_id=conv-30_conv_session_2_D2:2; speaker=Jon; listener=Gina; session_time=2:32 pm on 29 January, 2023]
Hey Gina! Whoa, your store looks great! All your hard work really paid off - congrats! Must be awesome to see your stuff on display.

[turn_id=conv-30_conv_session_2_D2:3; speaker=Gina; listener=Jon; session_time=2:32 pm on 29 January, 2023]
Thanks a bunch! It's awesome seeing my vision happen. How's the dance studio going? Did you find the right spot?

[turn_id=conv-30_conv_session_2_D2:4; speaker=Jon; listener=Gina; session_time=2:32 pm on 29 January, 2023]
Hey Gina! Thanks for asking. I'm on the hunt for the ideal spot for my dance studio and it's been quite a journey! I've been looking at different places and picturing how the space would look. I even found a place with great natural light! Oh, I've been to Paris yesterday! It was sooo cool.

attrs.fact: On 2:32 pm on 29 January, 2023, Gina mentioned Paris and Rome in conversation with Jon.
attrs.quote: Paris?! That is really great Jon! Never had a chance to visit it. Been only to Rome once.
attrs.original_text:
[turn_id=conv-30_conv_session_2_D2:5; speaker=Gina; listener=Jon; session_time=2:32 pm on 29 January, 2023]
Wow, nice spot! Where is it? Got any other features you want to think about before you decide? Paris?! That is really great Jon! Never had a chance to visit it. Been only to Rome once.

[turn_id=conv-30_conv_session_2_D2:6; speaker=Jon; listener=Gina; session_time=2:32 pm on 29 January, 2023]
It's downtown which is awesome cuz it's easy to get to. Plus the natural light! Gotta check the size & floor quality too. We need a good dance floor with enough bounce for me & my students to dance safely.

[turn_id=conv-30_conv_session_2_D2:7; speaker=Gina; listener=Jon; session_time=2:32 pm on 29 January, 2023]
Definitely! Dance floors help avoid injuries and make dancing more enjoyable. You thinking about it is great. Any particular type of flooring you like?

[turn_id=conv-30_conv_session_2_D2:8; speaker=Jon; listener=Gina; session_time=2:32 pm on 29 January, 2023]
Yeah, good flooring's crucial. I'm after Marley flooring, which is what dance studios usually use. It's great 'cause it's grippy but still lets you move, plus it's tough and easy to keep clean.
